description: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Third Coast Bank that provides various commercial banking solutions to small and medium-sized businesses and professionals in Texas, the United States. The company's deposit products include checking, money market, savings, and individual retirement accounts, as well as certificates of deposit. Its loan portfolio consists of commercial and residential real estate loans; construction, development and other loans; commercial and industrial loans; and farmland, consumer, and agricultural loans, as well as lease financing and bo
